acceptance_targets: [chapter_05_F001] Pass if, in the revised material corresponding to snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_05.md:239-449, each scene block introduces a new external consequence or decision and no two consecutive blocks merely restate house-rule compliance. Fail if the back half still repeats domestic process without changing stakes.

[chapter_05_F002] Pass if the revised passage aligned to snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_05.md:155-163 contains (1) at least one specific physical/action detail from the 2021 failure, (2) at least one broken or self-interrupted admission, and (3) no immediate de-escalating praise beat right after confession. Fail if the scene still resolves through polished abstract guilt language plus quick emotional release.

[chapter_05_F003] Pass if the revised exchange corresponding to snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_05.md:179-215 uses colloquial/contraction-heavy Eli replies in most turns and leaves at most one formal compliance token (e.g., "understood"/"agreed"/"fair"). Also pass only if the beat at snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_05.md:391 no longer relies on honorific stiffness ("ma'am") as default register. Fail otherwise.

[chapter_05_F004] Pass if the revised chapter keeps no more than two nod-formula beats total and each replacement beat communicates a different state (e.g., reluctance vs. irritation vs. guarded agreement) that is readable from the sentence itself. Fail if nod-formula phrasing still appears three or more times.

[chapter_05_F005] Pass if the revised span aligned to snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_05.md:165-217 includes at least three distributed interior beats and no stretch longer than six consecutive paragraphs without focal interiority. Fail if a 10+ paragraph exterior-only run remains.

findings.acceptance_test: Pass if, in the revised material corresponding to snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_05.md:239-449, each scene block introduces a new external consequence or decision and no two consecutive blocks merely restate house-rule compliance. Fail if the back half still repeats domestic process without changing stakes.
findings.problem: The chapter's strongest irreversible turn lands at the rule-sheet signature, but the back half runs long on reiterative compliance beats (meals, chores, sleep logistics) before the next real turn. That dilutes chapter-level propulsion and weakens the exit pressure into chapter_06.
findings.rewrite_direction: Compress and re-sequence the post-signature span at snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_05.md:239-449 so each retained beat changes stakes (money transfer status, meeting commitment, housing consequence). Cut or merge routine beats that only restate existing rules, and end on the highest-pressure actionable turn (currently around snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_05.md:441-449).

findings.acceptance_test: Pass if the revised passage aligned to snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_05.md:155-163 contains (1) at least one specific physical/action detail from the 2021 failure, (2) at least one broken or self-interrupted admission, and (3) no immediate de-escalating praise beat right after confession. Fail if the scene still resolves through polished abstract guilt language plus quick emotional release.
findings.problem: Sanitization drift at the emotional peak: Eli's rehab-session admission resolves into clean self-diagnosis phrasing and is followed almost immediately by verbal stabilization. The moment reads partially safety-valved instead of forcing sustained discomfort and consequence.
findings.rewrite_direction: Rewrite the confession-and-aftermath pocket at snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_05.md:155-163 to keep it messier and more embodied: make Eli's admission include concrete behavior from that missed-session window and at least one disrupted, self-protective turn before clarity; delay any soothing acknowledgment until after renewed pressure or a concrete demand.

findings.acceptance_test: Pass if the revised exchange corresponding to snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_05.md:179-215 uses colloquial/contraction-heavy Eli replies in most turns and leaves at most one formal compliance token (e.g., "understood"/"agreed"/"fair"). Also pass only if the beat at snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_05.md:391 no longer relies on honorific stiffness ("ma'am") as default register. Fail otherwise.
findings.problem: Eli's spoken register slips into stiff managerial compliance at high pressure ("Understood," "Agreed," "Fair," "It's fair," "Yes, ma'am"). For a high-contraction character in a domestic confrontation, this over-formality flattens realism and weakens idiolect texture.
findings.rewrite_direction: Revise Eli's response lines in snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_05.md:179-215 and snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_05.md:391-395 toward pressured colloquial speech (contractions, hesitations, partial pushback) while preserving his attempt to comply.

findings.acceptance_test: Pass if the revised chapter keeps no more than two nod-formula beats total and each replacement beat communicates a different state (e.g., reluctance vs. irritation vs. guarded agreement) that is readable from the sentence itself. Fail if nod-formula phrasing still appears three or more times.
findings.problem: Recurring gesture formula (nod-based beat tags) appears well over twice, turning emphasis into a prose tic rather than intentional variation.
findings.rewrite_direction: At snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_05.md:63, 177, 203, 363, and 445, vary physical response language so each beat carries distinct emotional information instead of repeating nod constructions.

findings.acceptance_test: Pass if the revised span aligned to snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_05.md:165-217 includes at least three distributed interior beats and no stretch longer than six consecutive paragraphs without focal interiority. Fail if a 10+ paragraph exterior-only run remains.
findings.problem: There is a long screenplay-like run during the rules negotiation where paragraph after paragraph carries dialogue and blocking but little focal interiority. The close-third anchor thins out right when psychological pressure should be most legible.
findings.rewrite_direction: In the rules block at snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_05.md:165-217, insert brief interior beats (thought, body sensation, self-assessment, memory flash) between leverage turns so Eli's internal stakes remain active while terms are set.

non_negotiables: Maintain heading contract exactly (# Chapter N).
Elliptical clipping is not permitted in dialogue or narration.
Avoid transcript cadence in high-stakes dialogue.
Avoid stiff over-formality in dialogue; use contractions and colloquial rhythm where character-true.
Reduce procedural drift when it displaces embodied consequence.
Maintain character-specific voice signatures from style bible.
Honor aesthetic risk policy: sanitization is the primary craft risk — do not soften, euphemize, or retreat from the story's established register. When in doubt, err toward rawness.

aesthetic_risk_policy.creative_risk_policy: Lean into morally mixed behavior, bodily consequence, and economic detail when they are causally active. In edge cases, choose the more concrete and uncomfortable rendering unless it violates factual continuity; if two renderings are equally plausible, prefer the one that increases character accountability rather than reader reassurance.
aesthetic_risk_policy.euphemism_penalty: If a scene contains pain, sex, addiction, debt panic, or humiliation, abstract phrasing is treated as a failed draft and must be rewritten with embodied specificity.

dialogue_rules.default_contraction_use: high - contractions are the spoken default; uncontracted forms are reserved for emphasis, legal precision, or deliberate emotional distance.

prose_style_profile.chapter_texture_variance: Alternate chapter architectures across the book: confrontation chapters, document-information turns, labor-process chapters, transit interiority chapters, and quiet relational chapters. Consecutive chapters must differ in scene density or dialogue-to-interiority ratio.
prose_style_profile.diction: Contemporary American literary realism: precise, unsentimental, image-aware, and concrete under stress.
prose_style_profile.narrative_distance: close third-person anchored to Eli, with no unmarked POV drift.
prose_style_profile.rhythm_target: Braided cadence: reflective medium-length sentences interrupted by blunt short lines at impact moments.
